entry.title: Alert - 'Save History' option not working
entry.content: Hi, the issue happen to this particular alert, the alert setup did not select the option "Save History', however, the alert received with history. The issue happen suddenly, started last Friday. I tried to update the this specific alert by tick and untick the "Save History', however, it has no help. Any idea?

entry.title: Re: is Odata supported in SAPME 15.5
entry.content:
hello Sriram2009,

thank you for the link , I had already that documentation and tried that one: http://server:50000/manufacturing-odata/Assembly.svc/FindAssembledAndUnfilledComponents?Sfc=%27TEST24200002%27&SITE=%27TEST1%27 , is it correct format? because when I write in the same format as in the document , I get this messgae :SFC/Process Lot/Shop Order field is missing a value (Message 15038), notice that the SFC is exist in the system.

1. what is the correct format?

my 2nd question is , is there any documentation for how to use the Odata response in the application development? 

thank you 

Br,

Vian

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi Siqi,
Data models need to explicilty added to just ask.  The best practice is to expose via just ask only models that have curated and validated with end-users. Many models are complex and would be confusing to content consumers.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – ZIP and Compress Capabilities: Encoder, Decoder, Splitter, Aggregate
entry.content:
Hi Tarun,

please try to put the complete path into the filename field (e.g. /DEF/ABC/file<x>.xml) in the ZIP Aggregator configuration, then the whole directory will be zipped. In the receiver adapter you then only specify the root folder where you store the DEF.zip

Please try if this works.

Best regards

Mandy

entry.title: I had public cloud and SAP BTP DMS service issue
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I had public cloud and SAP BTP DMS service the configuration as per required. Now when i am doing the attachment from Document management i.e. CV01N than file is getting saved to BTP DMS that i can see by using CMIS.

Now issue is when i save file for purchase order tile or PR tile the file is getting save to GOS and not in DMS. Also when i am trying to save file with custom application its not getting save to DMS

Please help where the configuration is missing.

entry.title: Public cloud save file to FTP
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I had custom application in which i want to save pdf and xls file to ftp server . Can we do this directly with custom application or it is possible with CPI.

Dose we have any document to check for the same.

entry.title: Re: EWM QM POSC QT creation error
entry.content: Fyi, I believe this error is mistake and should not be there - After some additional settings it seems to me the destination st. bin is properly assigned becouse once I unclick the error message, i can see the WT is ready to be created including destination QA st. type and storage bin - also Im able to push the Save button and the WT is created including destination st. type and st. bin. Based on this I believe the message is incorrect and now looking for way how to change it to warning becouse I think the standard  WPT settings "Allow WT creation in RF putaway" is not working due to this error

entry.title: SAP Gui - Program & ScreenNumber not working anymore
entry.content:
Hi all,

In my vba code I used the info.program and screen number to differentiate between different situations.

Now suddenly the program names and screen numbers changed in SAP. Is this possible due to an SAP update for example? Or do I need to use a different approach to differentiate possible popups so I do not have to change my whole code each time?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to identify prorration period at rate step level
entry.content:
I know this a old post. But I thought of adding a solution option from my end.

You can put additional validations in the user exit EBIA0002  ( EXIT_SAPLEA00_001 ) for IS-U: Enhancement for External Proration dates and define your own proration.

entry.title: The Future Has Been Written – the Rise of the Database Administrator
entry.content:
You might have received an email from SAP Learning informing you that your C_HANATEC_XX or C_HCADM_XX certification has been retired, or you found this retirement information on the SAP Certification Transformation | SAP Learning page.

Both channels provide the correct information. In this BLOG I will explain the why and the future for the SAP HANA certification.

 

Why the change?

There are two main reasons for the retirement of C_HANATEC and C_HCADM.

  • SAP has transformed itself into a cloud company in recent years. This cloud vision is not reflected in the C_HANATEC certification, because this certification is based on an on-premises product. The C_HCADM would fit perfectly into the cloud vision, however, the accompanying learning material is hands-on based and not well suited for a full certification.
  • SAP Learning's certification strategy has changed from product-based to role-based certifications. The C_HANATEC_XX and C_HCADM are product-based certification.

To meet the cloud and role-based strategy of SAP, I decided to break with the old, retiring C_HANATEC and C_HCADM, and move forward to something new. The new certification C_DBADM - SAP Certified Associate - Database Administrator - SAP HANA is role-based and reflects the SAP cloud strategy.

The C_DBADM merges the old C_HANATEC and C_HCADM certifications into one certification.

 

 

 
This merge isn’t a simple 1 to 1 copy of both certifications. I made sure that all pure on-premises topics from the courses HA201 - High Availability and Disaster Tolerance Administration, HA250 - Database Migration Using DMO, and HA215 - Using Monitoring and Performance Tools were removed. The new cloud topics from the SAP Learning Journeys HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud and HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud were added.

The Learning Journeys on learning.sap.com are available for free to everyone interested in the SAP HANA knowledge.

 

The C_DBADM Topics

When you start studying for the C_DBADM_2404 the following topic areas are important:

  • HA200 - Installing and Administering SAP HANA
  • HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud
  • HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud

Regardless of cloud or on-premises, an SAP HANA database administrator needs thorough knowledge of SAP HANA. This SAP HANA knowledge is conveyed in the theory chapters of the HA200 - Installing and Administering SAP HANA course. For this reason, the HA200 course remains part of the new C_DBADM certification.

In today's world, as an SAP HANA database administrator, you need to know your way around in cloud and on-premises. SAP HANA Cloud has many similarities to the SAP HANA platform, but there are differences. Hence, the HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud is also part of the new C_DBADM_2404 certification.

A new and important skill, for the coming years, is the knowledge how to migrate from an on-premises SAP HANA database to an SAP HANA Cloud database. To make sure you gain this knowledge I included the HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud learning journey into the C_DBADM certification.

Another change is version numbering. The certification C_DBADM now has the YYMM version numbering. The C_DBADB became available in April 2024, so the name of the current certification is thus C_DBADM_2404. Next April, the C_DBADM_2504 will be released.

 

Do I need to recertify myself?

Now I need to give you the classic SAP answer … it depends.

The holders of a C_HANATEC_15 to C_HANATEC_18 certification will be automatically migrated to the Stay Certified program and will automatically receive the new certification C_DBADM - SAP Certified Associate - Database Administrator - SAP HANA. No further action needed.

If you hold only a C_HCADM_XX certification, you must recertify yourself in the C_DBADM_2404 to join the Stay Certified program.

 

The Stay Certified program

On the 2nd of April 2024 SAP Learning launched the Stay Certified program. The new SAP Certification program makes it easier and faster for you to gain and maintain the latest skills and valid credentials on the key SAP technologies and solutions for your job.

In the Stay Certified program, you only need to pass the C_DBADM certification once to become a certified database administrator. After passing the exam, you can renew the certification every year by passing the Stay Certified Assessment questions. The assessment questions are based on the Stay Certified material made available each year.

 

 
The Stay Certified program offers you the opportunity to keep your certification up to date by answering questions on new SAP HANA topics each year via the Stay Certified assessment.

The Stay Certified program is SAP Learning answer to the frequently expressed desire from the learners to offer delta courses and delta certifications.

Important links:

  • Homepage: SAP Learning
  • Learning Journey: HA200 - Installing and Administering SAP HANA
  • Learning Journey: HC200 - Provisioning and Administering Databases in SAP HANA Cloud
  • Learning Journey: HA2HC - Migrating SAP HANA to SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP Certification Transformation on SAP Learning
  • SAP Learning Hub

Hay Bouten
SAP Learning - SAP HANA Portfolio Manager

entry.title: Re: Configuring Client ID and Secret on Neo Environment
entry.content:
Hello, I followed the provided tutorial to set up a user that allows the use of the API v1, but I am unable to make an OData call. Below are the details of the steps I have taken.

 

  1. I created my user at the subaccount level.

2. I granted the following authorization to enable sending calls to CPI.

3. I configured an OAuth credential in Security Materials as follows.

Token Service URL => https://oauthasservices-<<my tennant>>-tmn.hci.eu2.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token

4. I created the following CPI iFlow which makes an OData call.

 

I'm having difficulty connecting to the API. Could you please provide some assistance?

entry.title: Insights from Inetum & Accelleron on Harnessing the Power of the Configuration Localization Tool
entry.content:
Navigating the complexities of implementing enterprise software systems across various countries and regions can be a daunting task. One crucial aspect of this process is localization, which involves tailoring the software to meet local legal, regulatory, and cultural requirements. Luckily, SAP offers a range of standard local versions that simplify this process and make it more accessible. However, if your business operates in countries that are not covered by SAP's standard offering, you may have faced significant challenges in the past. Manual efforts in on-premise projects were once the norm, and this was not possible in the public cloud. But now, with the introduction of the Configuration Localization Tool embedded in SAP Central Business Configuration, the process has become hassle-free.

Screenshot of the Configuration Localization Tool embedded in the Define Scope app

The approach of implementing new countries and regions that are not localized by SAP is called localization as a self-service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. You can activate these countries with preconfigured content based on SAP Best Practices, giving you a head start in implementing localized operations in a wider range of countries worldwide. While the technical localization is taken care of, partners and customers customize the country from a business perspective. This self-service localization not only expands your country coverage but also saves you from the manual efforts associated with on-premise projects in the past.

If you're interested in hearing about real-world experiences with the Configuration Localization Tool, we have some valuable resources for you. In a fascinating podcast, Amine Drissi, pre-sales director at Inetum Business Solutions, shares insights into their experience as one of the first SAP partners to create a local customer version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with self-service localization for an African country. They delve into the specifics of the African market, SAP offerings, and discuss the benefits, challenges, and lessons learned from self-service localization.

Furthermore, we have a video in which Accelleron Industries shares their hands-on experience with localizing business processes for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to support their global operations. They were able to quickly adopt their solution across regions, allowing them to adapt to business disruptions and derive value more rapidly.

By leveraging the Configuration Localization Tool and hearing from industry experts, you can navigate the complexities of implementing enterprise software systems with ease and unlock new opportunities for your business on a global scale.

Has this piqued your interest? At the moment, the Configuration Localization Tool is only available to selected customers. Please stay tuned for its general availability. To learn more about this topic, you can go to the Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition page on SAP Community.

 

Co-authors: @Vivekkumar Upadhyay, @FabianAckermann

entry.title: Re: Process order showing double component in materials tab.
entry.content:
Hi Nilesh,

Thanks for your reply,

We have checked the issue with our APO team and we didn't found any duplicate component in APO system, Also we checked the master data there is no issue.

This issue is happening sometimes only like if 50 planned order created from APO and converted to process orders while clicking conversion indicator 2-3 process order affected this issue so its random seems like interface issue it is creating duplicate components.

We have created OSS to SAP for support in this issue.

Thanks in advance for your support,

Best Regards,

Varad Khairnar

entry.title: Quantity Scales determination in the multi payee condition contract
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In case of Multi Payee Condition Contract (0S02), the requirement is to determine the scale for settlement condition type is based on the Total Business quantity for all the customers maintained in the Business volume criteria in the condition contract, however the settlement calculation will be done on the basis of individual customer business volume quantity.

In this case, only the scales need to be determined based on the total business volume quantity. It works for the total business volume (Amount) when we assign Routine 2 to RES1 condition type and RBVT condition type to the business volume criteria. However, it does not work in cases where the scales need to be determined based on the total quantity.

Please suggest.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: Gen AI - Using Streamlit Python Library to Chat with Multiple PDF's via RAG and HANA Vector Engi
entry.content:
Hi Rohit, your blog is very interesting. Could you also share a Github repository (if you have one) with the entire code and Python dependencies?

Thanks,

Simmaco

entry.title: Re: Gen AI - Using Streamlit Python Library to Chat with Multiple PDF's via RAG and HANA Vector Engi
entry.content: Great Summary and well documented.

entry.title: BOM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one scenario,

we noticed that material 400011636705 is the direct son of the industrial code 759991676100, and it is expired.

we also noticed that material 400020000402 is another direct son of the industrial code 759991676100, and it is NOT expired.
 
but we also noticed that 400020000402 is direct son of 400011636705, and we believe that this is the reason why also the expired material appears in the resultset: because it is containing an active son.

MY QUESTION IS : Is it NORMAL? that a component is the direct son of an industrial and at the same time is the direct son of an expired component.
 
thank you in advance

entry.title: Datasphere- Unique constrain violation in G/L Hierarchy data replication
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Have you guys face unique constraint violation while  datasphere G/L Hierarchy data replication ?

I am using standard G/L hierarchy CDS view , when I look at the table I can see few extra fields (datasphere generated fields)and a key field named as “Hash ID for hierarchy “ which stop me to replicate data into datasphere.

Need your input to fix this issue.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Regarding Translation issue for GUI title.
entry.content: my god that solved my issue too..thanks guru

entry.title: Re: Alert - 'Save History' option not working
entry.content:
Dear beehoiphoebe_yeo 

Check whether this issue is with the Alert service itself or if it is Database specific.

Check if you are able to open both of the Service Layer url's to make sure that the Service Layer Service is running correctly.

It may be an incorrect query or specific alert causing a problem.

Deactivate all the active alerts and test with new simple test alert only and run with manager user.
Set the frequency to 1 minute and "Save History" ticked. 

Close all the existing open sessions and then try again.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Negation in annotation @ui.hidden
entry.content:
Hi,

I know, but i need dynamic hidden value from atrubute.

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Exam Guidance
entry.content: Hi @RK99, so there is a difference between the products we offer to buy that include certification attempts - for example a 6 attempt package or a 1 attempt package - and the attempts you have to be able to pass one exam. If you try to pass an exam you have trials (which means 3 attempts consumed) to pass it. So - when you are well prepared - with a 6 attempt package you can pass 6 certifications when you pass all of them with the first trial. Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 4
entry.content: Here is my week 4 submission

entry.title: Re: Export for transport type CBC locked. No target syste...
entry.content:
Dear @sdig89

Are you trying to export a customizing request form a development tenant here ?

Please check the documentation in help page 3-System Landscape and Transport Management

You can only use the customizing tenant for  business configuration transports. There is no option available to transport customizing there so you should use the other tenant for this purpose only.

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Multiple Profit center issue in Delta accrual document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When we are performing Delta accruals against the condition contract for multiple profit centers, the Delta accruals document is not being posted to the accounts. An error message "GLT2201 - Balancing field Profit Center in line item not filled" is displayed. The settlement document is created correctly for the multiple profit centers and the invoices are also posted correctly for different profit centers. However, when we execute the Delta accruals document, the system is unable to post the document for the multiple profit centers. The Delta accruals work fine in the case of a single profit center.

Please advise.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Copy inspection results from SFG to FG in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I need to copy inspection results from an SFG inspection lot to FG in a public cloud environment. I activated the results copy in the configuration.

I have recorded the results for the SFG material, and for the FG, whenever I try to copy results in QA32, I get the previous inspection lot number and batches, shown below.

But when I choose the required inspection lot/Batch, I get the following error.

Could someone explain what is wrong here?

PS: Previously, the customer used data selection as "300 - Custom selection of Inspection lot" in their S4Hana system; but as it is not available in the cloud system, I chose "200 - Data from Insps for Preliminary Product".

We have implemented EWM and with order release the PMR is created.

Can you please help me how to setup ECC so when I reschedule order or change quantity of component the PMR update is automatically send to EWM?

Thanks

entry.title: Tabbed based Business Role in SAP Solution Manager 7.2
entry.content:
Introduction

The following article describes how to customize the business role view as a tabbed view. This can be done for scenarios like Change Request Management, IT Service Management, Requirements Management, etc. The tabbed view gives the user a better overview of all given information instead of scrolling down to find everything.

 

Customizing Settings

The customizing for the tile layout starts in transaction SPRO.

To use this function, the Header-Component of the corresponding BSP Application and the Overviewpage Controller Page Key must be maintained. These information can be found in the component workbench in transaction BSP_WD_CMPWB.

Information for Overviewpage Controller Page Key:

For Change Request Management, the entries are often already maintained. For IT Service Management the entries must be maintained manually.

For Change Requests: AIC_CMCR_H

For Change Documents: AIC_CMCD_H

For Incidents: AIC_INCIDENT_H

For Problems: AIC_PROBLEM_H

After saving the entries, the business role where the tile layout shall be used, must be opened with transaction SM_CRM. Choose the custom business role like for example ZSOLMANPRO and open an Incident, Change Request or Change Document (depends in which scenario you want to use this feature).

Click the button "Configure page".

In your customer configuration choose "Switch to Tile Layout".

Choose the tile layout you would like to have.

Assign all relevant assignment blocks to Tile 1 or Tile 2 you need for your scenario.

After saving, the configuration is finished and needs to be transported to the productive SAP Solution Manager to use it.

 

Conclusion

With the tabbed view for your used scenario in the CRM Web UI the relevant information can be found easier and faster. The tabbed view can be changed in different cells to categorize the information of an ticket you need.

If you have any questions or input, please feel free to comment and share!

You are also encouraged to follow SAP Solution Manager tag here and the Application Lifecycle Management tag here.

entry.title: Re: DEBUG Custom logic S4HANA CLOUD

entry.title: SEN Signavio Missing Attribute error
entry.content:
We had integrated SIgnavio and SEN successfully, created attributes, Imported Process structure to SEN, linked Document's and were able to exports links to SIgnavio.

Now we have some updates to be done. We SEN is connecting to Signavio, but for any further steps we are facing the Missing attribute issues.

And when I click on “Manage SAP Signavio Attributes”, I get the below message.

And on further clicking on “Create and Reload” I get the below error message…

The workspace is same as before, the attributes were already there, and we can see the attributes in Signavio. The SEN user has Master author role and admin access on SIgnavio.

 

We are not sure what is the issue. Has anyone encountered similar issues or have any suggestion to resolve this?

entry.title: Integation SAP S4hana Public Cloud with 3rd Party SW ( No HTTPS)
entry.content:
Hi, i need to integrate a third party software ( SW Warehouse that use other protocol then https ) with S4HANA Public Cloud . Since S4HANA Public only works with HTTPS !

The only option is to use SAP CPI to convert from https <-> RFC ? 

Or there is another solution ?

Thanks for your help

Rui Gonzalez

entry.title: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Database Connection
entry.content: I am using SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit edition. I am using Oracle Server connection for Oracle 19c. When I want to connect to Oracle 19c, it is waiting approximately 8 minutes. After then it is connected. When I want to add a new table with this connection, it is waiting approximately 8 minutes again. Do you know a solution for it? When I want to connect to Microsoft SQL Server with OLE DB (ADO) connection, it connects quickly. There is no waiting problem. If you have a soluiton for it, I would be very greatfull.

entry.title: How to add a Sales Employee partner function to a Business Partner?
entry.content:
There is a requirement to add the Sales Employee (SE) Partner Function to a Business Partner, how can this be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add a Sales Employee partner function to a Bus...
entry.content:
1. Open the Maintain Business Partner App. 
  2. Select the relevant Business Partner record.
  3. Open the Business Partner in the Customer Role (FLCU01).
  4. Click on the "Sales and Distribution" button. 
  5. Click on Partner Functions.
  6. Set the Business Partner into change mode.
  7. Add SE Partner Function within the grid.

entry.title: Re: Creation of HU in auto mode with external number range
entry.content: To receive material in a HU from production order use transaction COP1.

entry.title: Re: How to send data in x-www-form-urlencoded from SAP PI
entry.content: Dear Dileep

entry.title: Innovations in Environment, Health, and Safety with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01
entry.content:
SAP Environment, Health, and Safety (EHS) covers a wide scope of business processes in the area of environment management and workplace safety. With SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 new and enhanced functions are offered in the following areas of EHS:

  • Environment Management
  • Waste Management (a sub-topic of Environment Management)
  • Health and Safety Management

For each of these the following paragraphs give an overview of the new features and offer a video showing additional details.

If you are rather interested in the parallel public cloud innovations - which are quite similar to the ones shown here - have a look at the article Innovations in Environment, Health, and Safety with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.

 

Environment Management

SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 brings the following innovations (see also Help Portal documentation)

  • Enhancements to the Emissions Declaration
  • New type of Compliance Scenario designed for facilities handling substances that are subject to German environmental regulations
  • Enhanced Reporting functions
  • Integration of greenhouse gas emissions data from Environment Management with SAP Sustainability Control Tower

 

Waste Management

SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 brings the following innovations (see also Help Portal documentation)

  • Land Disposal Restriction Form enhancing the Hazardous Waste Manifest​
  • Integration with Inventory Management​
  • Extensibility for Waste Transfer Requests​
  • Synchronization of Confirmed Quantities from Waste Transportation Documents to Waste Transfer Requests​
  • Manually added Remarks for Waste Transfer Requests

​

Health and Safety Management

SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 brings the following innovations (see also Help Portal documentation)

  • Email User Notification in risk assessment tasks (created, overdue, completed, rejected, ...)

 

Summary

In this article the innovations in Environment, Health, and Safety (EHS) with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 were listed in overview form and were presented in detail in video form.

A complete functional overview of EHS can be found in the Help Portal documentation.

entry.title: Re: Replicating Opt-Outs from external webforms to Market...
entry.content:
Hi Sören,

Having 3 contacts with the same email address “info@-address” is not really quality data. An address of type “info@-address” refers to a mailbox and not really a dedicated contact. This is not really an address that will drive good marketing.

At this point, the strategy is really to get a proper unique email address for each contact, otherwise, it is seen as just one contact and all 3 contacts should be merged into one.

Best Regards, Isabelle

entry.title: Re: Multiple Profit center issue in Delta accrual document
entry.content: Check whether you need to implement BAdi as recommended in SAP note 3403888

entry.title: Re: How to send data in x-www-form-urlencoded from SAP PI
entry.content: Dear Dileep, have you implemented this interface? i have also same requirement. if you have implemented which approach have you used? is it Java mapping or XSLT mapping?

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite with HA and DR scenarios
entry.content:
Hi @adam_kiwon3.

I made a mistake: SAP Business Technology Platform Supplemental Terms and Conditions override SAP Service Level Agreements for cloud services. For SAP Business Technology Platform the SLA is 99,9% instead of 99,7%.

This is a monthly SLA, so it's less than 1 hour per month. And, in case your critical business scenario cannot assume this outage, there's still the option to implement a Disaster Recovery architecture.

Regards.

Carles.

entry.title: Re: Implementing Workflow for Transaction Codes F-28, F-29, and F-36 in SAP
entry.content:
Hi AVT,

First, check which events are been triggered by these transactions, then analyze if the possible workflows fit your needs.

Regards

entry.title: Task 2141 - Calculate Grp Shares % (PL30) does not show group shares
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,


I would appreciate if you could help me with a problem I am having regarding task 2141 - Calculate Grp Shares % (PL30) in group reporting for Public Cloud.
I present the situation in case someone can help me because despite seeing other posts I can't solve the problem.

We are in an SAP Public cloud scenario  using rule based consolidation.

We have a consolidation group with the following structure:

We have configured the group as you can see in the following picture:

We have entered the group's shares with a file containing the following data:

 

 

Once we have recorded the entry, we can see that the shares have been registered in the system.

When we are about to launch the task 2141 - Calculate Grp Shares % (PL30)

We can see that the system does not show us the shares registered in the system f

I would appreciate it if someone could help me understand what I might be doing wrong.

Regards

entry.title: Characteristics relation is not populating
entry.content:
I have one requirement. I want to add default ZPLANT and ZBUSINESS  . these two fields I have not added in aggregation level. I am writing below codes.

 

method IF_RSPLS_CR_METHODS~DERIVE.


field-symbols: <ZPLANT> type any,
<ZPLANT1> TYPE any,
<ZBUS_AREA1> TYPE any,
<ZBUS_AREA> TYPE ANY.
BREAK-POINT.
ASSIGN COMPONENT '/BIC/OIZPLANT' of structure c_s_chas to <ZPLANT>.
ASSIGN COMPONENT 'ZPLANT' of structure c_s_chas to <ZPLANT>.
ASSIGN COMPONENT '/BIC/OIZBUS_AREA' of structure c_s_chas to <ZBUS_AREA1>.
ASSIGN COMPONENT 'ZBUS_AREA' of structure c_s_chas to <ZBUS_AREA>.
<ZPLANT> = '0005'.
<ZPLANT1> = '0005'.
<ZBUS_AREA> = 'ttt'.
<ZBUS_AREA1> = 'ttt'.
break sapuser.
endmethod.

I am executing queries and saving data. I am executing planning sequence but derivation is not happening

entry.content: Thanks it worked

entry.title: Distribution percentage missing in MIRO
entry.content:
Hello gurus,

in a new S/4 system I try to post a GR for a PO item with multiple account assignment. All the account assignments are displayed on the Account Assignment tab, but the column with the distribution percentages (VPROZ) is missing.

Any idea on how to activate this in customizing?

Cheers
Jens

entry.title: Re: Call a RFC in ABAP RAP save sequence
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thnx for the response, calling the RFC using RAP business events is a possible solution but not suitable for our case as we need the result (created sales order number) of the RFC in the response.

Kind regards,
Mattijs

entry.title: Re: Implementations not showing in the IMG
entry.content: Check in implementation attributes for flags such as "not switchable in Customizing" or "Example"

entry.title: sap abap email functionality using classes issue with html table
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I have to send email via program . When I created the body of the email without containing any variable but only text, there is no issue in it. But when I wants to get variable values inside table it is not taking the values.

it_email_body[] = VALUE #( ( line = '<html><body>' )
                           ( line = 'Date:'  )   "how to use sy-datum here.
                            ( line = '<br>')
                            ( line = 'Subject: Revalidate request' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'QA/ QC Team.' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'Refer to below details of material expiring/ expired. You are requested to kindly review and re-validate the same.' )

   ( line = '<br>')
   ( line = '<table style="font-family:calibri;font-size:15;MARGIN:10px;"' )
   ( line = 'cellspacing="0" cellpadding="1" width="75%" ')
   ( line =  'border="1"><tbody><tr>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Sr. No.</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material Description</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material code</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Expired / Expiring on</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Batch No.</th>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-matnr '</td>' )  "facing issue at this line for creating second  row for values to  the table from the worarea WA-matnr wa-batch .
( line = '<tr><td>' wa-  '</td></tr>' )
   ( line =   )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-charg 
*   ( line =  '</td>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-vfdat 
*   ( line = '</td>' )

  ( line = '</html></body>' )

 ( line = 'Post validation, kindly share the re-validated/ validity extension certificate for updates and records.' )

This is not working.

it_email_body TYPE bcsy_text,  as per the c ode

note : My aim here is to get html table to be added to program with  email functionality.
 ( line = 'Regards' )
 ( line = 'Stores Team.' ) ).

entry.title: How to create a table in SAP HANA Cloud Database with end user's input
entry.content:
I am a CAPM developer, as I'm new to this technology I need some suggestions.

I have a requirement of creating a table in SAP HANA Database with end user's input from the UI. Is that possible to create a table without defining the entity in schema and also view that table in the UI using SAP Fiori elements. Please help me with your suggestion.

 

Thanks & Regards
Sudha.

entry.title: Re: ABAP on BTP Trial Instance creation is getting Failed
entry.content:
Someone might find it useful as I had faced the similar issue.

I have faced this issue despite trying several alternatives. Finally, I deleted my sub account(Azure-Singapore region) and created a new sub account(AWS- US regions) and it worked.

entry.title: Re: Different exchange rate in RFUMSV00
entry.content: Hi Ernesto,

entry.title: Re: Different exchange rate in RFUMSV00
entry.content: Hi Ernesto, Thanks for your answer. Sorry for the misunderstanding - I didn´t know that the app will help you more than the report.But I guess, this does not solve our problem. Perform Currency Valuation does not update the journal entry, does it? It does not change the initial journal entry and tay items. This entry will be used in "Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax". If I got your answer wrong, then pleaseget back to me. Thanks, Sabrina

entry.title: Configuring Installation Points (Reference Designators) in SAP S/4HANA and SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Introduction

Installation points (or reference designators) are vastly used in many industries including high-tech, to determine the specific location of a given component instance in either the engineering or manufacturing BOM for better tracking of where that particular instance is physically located during assembly, disassembly, reassembly, and other production activities. 

In SAP S/4HANA, installation points can be maintained as subitems in BOM and integrated to SAP Digital Manufacturing to improve manufacturing processes like nonconformance logging, for example.

Learn more about Installation points:

In this blog post, I will show you how to configure installation points in SAP S/4HANA BOM and how to use installation points in SAP Digital Manufacturing to improve the overall manufacturing, nonconformance and rework processes.

Configuration

To maintain installation points as BOM subitems in SAP S/4HANA, open Material BOM app and create/edit your BOM. Select the desired component and click on 'Subitems' button as follows:

In the Subitems view, scroll down to 'BOM sub-items' section and fill the subitem details like, Installation Point, Sub-Item Qty, Sub item Text as follows:

Save it!

Keep in mind that a subitem is not a component, it just represents the position where the component is supposed to be installed in Assembly/Sub-assembly.

At this point in time, your BOM including installation points is ready to be used and you can create a Production Order and have it distributed to SAP Digital Manufacturing for execution.

In SAP Digital Manufacturing, if a single BOM component that is transferred from SAP S/4HANA has multiple installation points, then it is transferred as multiple components. For example, if brake levers on a bicycle are installed on the right and left handlebar, then the component has two installation points and the component quantity is also two.

See an example below, where component D1881415_1 shows up twice in BOM, one time for each Installation Point earlier configured in ERP.

In Manage Orders, at BOM tab, component shows twice:

In Manage Bills of Materials, for the order-specific BOM of my sample production order, you can see that the component also shows twice, and that for each entry, the respective installation point information is syncronized:

Now that SAP S/4HANA setup is complete and we have a production order with installation point information in place, let´s configure SAP Digital Manufacturing to support installation point information during nc logging.

In Manage Data Fields, create two new data fields like COMPONENT and REF_DES as follows:

In Manage Data Types, create a Nonconformance (NC) Data Type, including at least the previously created Data Fields as follows:

In Manage Nonconformance Codes, assign the newly created NC Data Type to Nonconformance Data Type field for all the relevant Nonconformance Codes:

In Manage Work Instructions, create a new Work Instruction, add a new Work Instruction Element of type File, upload a 3d model .vds file and fill Metadata Category and Key fields matching your .vds 3d model file metadata (see an example further down below).

Where:

The Category that defines the metadata for the component name key and the installation point key. This category is contained in a local or uploaded VDS file. The Metadata Category is mandatory if you want to enable a BOM component search using metadata. Additionally, make sure to provide values for either the Component Name Key or the Installation Point Key.

The Component Name of the metadata key that identifies a BOM component. This key is defined in the metadata category of a local or uploaded VDS file.

The Installation Point of the metadata key that identifies an installation point of the BOM component. This key is defined in the metadata category of a local or uploaded VDS file.

Using SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Author, maintain your .vds 3d model file metadata to match the metadata mapping previously done in Manage Work Instructions above, see an example below:

In POD Designer, make sure Nonconformance Data Entry and Work Instruction Viewer (in Independent Mode) and placed side-by-side, so they can interact. Example:

All set! Open your POD and give it a try!

First, select and start a SFC and make sure you assemble all the required components.

In Component List POD Plugin, note that Installation Point information is now displayed:

It´s also displayed in Assemble Components POD Plugin, during component assembly itself:

Which supports the overall manufacturing and component assembly process.

If the component is not yet assembled, Nonconformance Logging for that specific component will fail.

Once components are assembled, select a Nonconformance Code with Nonconformance Data Type mapped in Nonconformance Data Entry plugin, so the data fields created earlier for Component and Installation Point Data Fields show up, and select back and forth components and installation points between both Nonconformance Data Entry and Work Instruction Viewer plugins, where selecting a component and installation point in one plugin should reflect and update the other plugin and vice-versa.

Once you select the exact component instance in the 3d model work instruction, component and installation point information should be filled in Nonconformance Data Entry plugin, enhancing the overall NC log process.

Nonconformances logged containing Component and Installation Point information should have this information reflected and displayed across the system, like in NC Data Tree plugin, improving rework and root cause analisys processes:

Demo

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Discrete Manufacturing in Private Cloud, powered by SAP
Discrete Manufacturing in Public Cloud, powered by SAP
Process Industry Manufacturing with SAP Digital Manufacturing
AI-driven Visual Inspection powered by SAP
Real-Time Operations Monitoring in SAP Digital Manufacturing
Installation Points in SAP Digital Manufacturing

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: How to delete or edit condition value in ME22N
entry.content: What if payment already done, how to change it? No way?

entry.title: S_ALR_87012993 drill down to KOB1
entry.content:
Hi to all,

in our system S4/Hana 755 (S4CORE release 105, SP 6) we are experiecing a problem with transaction S_ALR_87012993 and drill down to actual costs.

When I launch the S_ALR_87012993 report for a single internal order, then I double click on "Effective" column and select "Orders: Actual Line Items" report, it executes the KOB1 transaction, but after a very very long time it shows the result for ALL internal orders and not for the only one selected ... 

I try to detach the KOB1 report, re-attach it and re-generate, but didn't resolved the issue ...

Can anyone help me ?

Thanks in advance 

Andrea

entry.title: Re: SAP C_SECAUTH_20 Certification

entry.title: In Rewards and recognition we need to hide below things from the nominator & Nominee
entry.content:
In Rewards and recognition we need to hide below things from the nominator & Nominee

 

  1. Award Levels to hide 
  2. Payment Method on nominee Screen

entry.title: Dear Experts, Please advise how to change conditions from RBXX to PB00 in PO? Payment exists.
entry.content:
Business users have issue with gross price in the PO. Somehow, the gross price in one of the line items vanished. We tried to change in conditions tab condition type from RBXX to PB00. But there is purchase history and payment already done.

My question is: Is it possible without reverse to change condition type in PO?

Thanks,

Botagoz

entry.content:
Hello,

We are using ML,for different reasons mainly described in OSS note 483493 - Posting logic of the material ledger closing; we would like to extend posting with account modifications:

PRY-PNL    
PRV-PPL
PRV-PNL
We are in ECC EHP8 last SP.

When I extend OBYC with all the details and launch the ML cycle, the system doesn't take into consideration the new entries. Do you have any idea why?

entry.title: Re: Negation in annotation @ui.hidden
entry.content: you can bind the attribute using expression binding as suggested in the documentation

entry.content: AFAIK no exit, no BAdI, Look for some implicit Enh point (in some called form)

TIA.

entry.title: Enable Now Web Assistant is covering the application screen
entry.content:
When opening enable now Desktop Assistant and Custom Web Assistant the side bar opens correcly but it is covering the application screen.

 

Do you know if there's any setting or parameter or expert feature to add in order to adjust this behaviour so that enable now side bar (Companion main window) will not go over the application screen?

entry.title: How to download a data change report for Comp and Job info after particular date
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on building a report for another 3P tool for variable payout for incentive schemes which is based on employee's org details and salary details.

When we build an adhoc report, and want to create a report for the employee data only when there are any changes made to the employee profile in Job or comp info portlet. 

For example, comp changed on 1 Jun 2023 effective 1 Apr 2023 from 100 to 110, and if we pull a report on 2 Jun, only this employee record should come.

another example, if we put the last modified date as 1 Jun 2023, any records updated after 1 Jun 2023 should only be reported for comp or job info. 

Any suggestions to solve this will be appreciated. 

thanks. V

entry.title: ABAP Data Dictionary - Initial Value Indicator for a field in a Table
entry.content:
While creating a table field, I did check the initial value indicator for the field of data type char. This means that the field will not accept null (i.e. force NOT NULL). But to my surprise, while adding a entry to this table, this field had no entry (empty / null) and it still saved the data into the table. 

So why didn't the initial value indicator that was checked for the field didn't work.

entry.title: Users are requesting correspondence of types 0016 and R025 but neither is processed by FPCOPARA
entry.content:
Hello!

For correspondence type '0016' and 'R025' mentioned standard application forms are triggering IS_U_MOVE_OUT_NOTIFICATION and  IS_U_BBP_NOTIFICATION. We wanted to know from which process these standard forms are triggering?

Thank you and regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Users are requesting correspondence of types 0016 and...
entry.content:
Hello!

The correspondence type 0016 (Move-Out Confirmation) is created inside transaction ec56, there you can find button 'Move-out confirmation'.

The correspondence type R025 (Budget Billing Plan) is created inside transaction ea61 when you create a new budget billing plan.

From technical point of view, you can see in table TFK070A that the event R815 and R968 are called during the creation of correspondence type 0016 and R025.

Best regards,
Ronny

entry.title: Re: File Upload Widget – How to develop custom widgets with the react framework

Cost center is available as an input control to my application.
